sys_script_include.description: Parses an AI-generated JSON payload and performs the requested ServiceNow administrative action (create/update variables, catalog items, or users). Called from the AI Super Prompt Executor Flow.
sys_script_include.name: SuperPromptProcessor

sc_cat_item.description:
Use this catalog item to submit a ServiceNow administrative task that was generated by the AI Super Prompt.

How to use

  1. Open your AI chatbot (Copilot, ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.).
  2. Paste the contents of super_prompt.txt to initialise the assistant.
  3. Describe the ServiceNow change you need (e.g. "Create a mandatory text variable called 'Cost Centre' on the 'New Laptop Request' catalog item").
  4. Copy the JSON output produced by the AI.
  5. Paste it into the JSON Payload field below and submit.

The attached flow will parse your JSON and automatically perform the requested change in your ServiceNow instance, then add a work note to this request with a summary of what was done.
sc_cat_item.name: AI Super Prompt Executor
sc_cat_item.short_description: Submit an AI-generated JSON payload to automate a ServiceNow admin task

item_option_new.help_tag: Paste the raw JSON that was generated by the AI chatbot here. Do not modify the JSON — submit it exactly as produced by the AI.
item_option_new.label: JSON Payload
item_option_new.name: v_json_payload

sys_hub_flow.description: Processes the AI-generated JSON payload submitted via the "AI Super Prompt Executor" catalog item. Calls the SuperPromptProcessor Script Include to perform the requested ServiceNow admin action and adds a work note to the RITM.
sys_hub_flow.label: AI Super Prompt Executor Flow
sys_hub_flow.name: ai_super_prompt_executor_flow
